title: DocuSign Envelope Schema
description: JSON Schema defining the core data models for DocuSign eSignature envelopes, recipients, documents, tabs, and templates. An envelope is the fundamental container for a DocuSign signing transaction.

Envelope.title: Envelope
Envelope.description: The fundamental unit of a DocuSign signing transaction. An envelope contains the documents to be signed, the recipients who will act on them, and the workflow rules governing the signing process.

envelopeId.description: The unique identifier of the envelope, assigned by DocuSign upon creation.

envelopeUri.description: The URI path for retrieving the envelope via the REST API.

statusChangedDateTime.description: The date and time when the envelope status was last changed.

emailSubject.description: The subject line of the email notification sent to recipients.

emailBlurb.description: The body text of the email notification sent to recipients.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time when the envelope was created.

sentDateTime.description: The date and time when the envelope was sent to recipients.

deliveredDateTime.description: The date and time when the envelope was first delivered to a recipient.

completedDateTime.description: The date and time when all recipients completed their actions and the envelope was finalized.

declinedDateTime.description: The date and time when a recipient declined to sign the envelope.

voidedDateTime.description: The date and time when the sender voided the envelope.

voidedReason.description: The reason provided by the sender for voiding the envelope.

documents.description: The documents included in this envelope.

purgeState.description: The purge state of the envelope, indicating whether documents have been purged for data retention compliance.

brandId.description: The ID of the brand applied to the envelope for custom theming.

certificateUri.description: The URI for retrieving the certificate of completion.

signingLocation.description: Whether the signing takes place in person or online.

expireEnabled.description: When set to true, the envelope has an expiration date.

expireDateTime.description: The date and time when the envelope will expire.

expireAfter.description: The number of days after sending before the envelope expires.

autoNavigation.description: When true, auto-navigation guides recipients through the signing process.

isSignatureProviderEnvelope.description: Indicates whether this envelope uses a third-party signature provider.

EnvelopeStatus.title: Envelope Status
EnvelopeStatus.description: The lifecycle status of a DocuSign envelope. Envelopes progress through these states from creation to completion.

EnvelopeDefinition.title: Envelope Definition
EnvelopeDefinition.description: The definition used to create a new envelope. Contains all the properties needed to define documents, recipients, tabs, and workflow.

emailSubject.description: The subject line of the email sent to recipients. Required when sending.

emailBlurb.description: The body text of the email sent to recipients.

status.description: Set to 'sent' to send immediately or 'created' to save as draft.

templateId.description: The ID of a template to use as the basis for this envelope.

templateRoles.description: Role assignments mapping recipients to template-defined roles.

documents.description: The documents to include in the envelope.

compositeTemplates.description: Composite templates combining server and inline templates for complex workflows.

brandId.description: The ID of the brand to apply.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: A document included in an envelope for signing. Documents can be provided as base64-encoded content, by URL reference, or from a template.

documentId.description: A unique identifier for the document within the envelope, assigned by the sender.

name.description: The display name of the document.

fileExtension.description: The file extension (e.g., pdf, docx) used to determine content type.

documentBase64.description: The base64-encoded content of the document.

remoteUrl.description: A URL from which DocuSign retrieves the document content.

order.description: The display order of the document within the envelope.

pages.description: The number of pages in the document.

display.description: How the document is presented to the signer.

includeInDownload.description: When true, includes this document in bulk downloads.

transformPdfFields.description: When true, PDF form fields are converted to DocuSign tabs.

Recipients.title: Recipients
Recipients.description: The collection of all recipients for an envelope, organized by recipient type. Each type has different capabilities and responsibilities in the signing workflow.

signers.description: Recipients who must sign the documents.

carbonCopies.description: Recipients who receive a copy of the completed envelope but do not sign.

certifiedDeliveries.description: Recipients who must confirm receipt of the documents.

inPersonSigners.description: Recipients who sign in person with a host managing the session.

agents.description: Recipients who designate another person to sign on their behalf.

editors.description: Recipients who can edit the envelope before it is sent.

intermediaries.description: Recipients who forward the envelope to another person for signing.

witnesses.description: Recipients who verify the identity of a signer.

recipientCount.description: The total number of recipients across all types.

currentRoutingOrder.description: The routing order position currently being processed.

Signer.title: Signer
Signer.description: A recipient who must sign one or more documents in the envelope. Signers are the primary actors in the signing workflow.

recipientId.description: A unique identifier for the recipient within the envelope.

recipientIdGuid.description: The GUID assigned to the recipient by DocuSign.

name.description: The full legal name of the signer.

email.description: The email address of the signer.

routingOrder.description: The order in which the signer receives the envelope. Lower numbers go first; equal numbers sign in parallel.

roleName.description: The role name for matching with template roles.

clientUserId.description: When set, makes this an embedded signer who signs through your application rather than via email.

status.description: The current status of the signer in the workflow.

deliveredDateTime.description: When the envelope was delivered to the signer.

declinedReason.description: The reason the signer provided for declining.

accessCode.description: An access code the signer must enter to view the documents.

requireIdLookup.description: When true, ID verification is required before signing.

note.description: A private note from the sender to the signer.

CarbonCopy.title: Carbon Copy Recipient
CarbonCopy.description: A recipient who receives a copy of the completed documents but does not take any signing action.

recipientId.description: A unique identifier for the recipient.

name.description: The full name of the recipient.

email.description: The email address of the recipient.

routingOrder.description: The routing order for the recipient.

roleName.description: The role name for template matching.

status.description: The current status of the recipient.

CertifiedDelivery.title: Certified Delivery Recipient
CertifiedDelivery.description: A recipient who must confirm receipt of the envelope documents.

InPersonSigner.title: In-Person Signer
InPersonSigner.description: A signer who signs in person with a host present to manage the signing session.

hostName.description: The name of the signing host.

hostEmail.description: The email of the signing host.

signerName.description: The name of the in-person signer.

signerEmail.description: The email of the in-person signer.

Agent.title: Agent Recipient
Agent.description: A recipient who can designate another person to sign in their place.

Editor.title: Editor Recipient
Editor.description: A recipient who can edit the envelope before it is sent.

Intermediary.title: Intermediary Recipient
Intermediary.description: A recipient who can forward the envelope to another person for signing.

Witness.title: Witness Recipient
Witness.description: A recipient who verifies the identity of a signer during the signing process.

RecipientTabs.title: Recipient Tabs
RecipientTabs.description: The collection of tabs (fields) assigned to a recipient, organized by tab type. Tabs define where and how recipients interact with documents during signing.

signHereTabs.description: Signature tabs requiring the recipient to apply their signature.

initialHereTabs.description: Initial tabs requiring the recipient to initial.

dateSignedTabs.description: Tabs auto-populated with the date the recipient signed.

fullNameTabs.description: Tabs auto-populated with the recipient's full name.

radioGroupTabs.description: Radio button group tabs for single-choice selection.

noteTabs.description: Read-only note tabs for displaying text.

Tab.title: Tab
Tab.description: Base tab properties shared by all tab types. A tab is a field placed on a document page for recipient interaction.

tabId.description: The unique identifier for the tab.

tabLabel.description: A label used to identify and reference the tab.

documentId.description: The ID of the document where this tab is placed.

pageNumber.description: The page number where this tab is placed.

recipientId.description: The recipient this tab is assigned to.

xPosition.description: The horizontal position of the tab on the page in pixels.

yPosition.description: The vertical position of the tab on the page in pixels.

anchorString.description: A text string used to automatically position the tab relative to text in the document.

anchorXOffset.description: Horizontal offset from the anchor string position.

anchorYOffset.description: Vertical offset from the anchor string position.

value.description: The current value of the tab.

SignHereTab.title: Sign Here Tab
SignHereTab.description: A signature tab requiring the recipient to apply their electronic signature.

scaleValue.description: The scale factor for the signature.

optional.description: When true, the signature is optional.

stampType.description: The type of stamp for the signature.

TextTab.title: Text Tab
TextTab.description: A free-form text input tab with optional validation.

required.description: When true, the tab must be filled in.

locked.description: When true, the value cannot be changed by the recipient.

width.description: The width of the tab in pixels.

height.description: The height of the tab in pixels.

font.description: The font face for the text.

validationPattern.description: A regular expression pattern for input validation.

validationMessage.description: The error message displayed when validation fails.

concealValueOnDocument.description: When true, the value is concealed on the final document.

CheckboxTab.title: Checkbox Tab
CheckboxTab.description: A checkbox tab for boolean true/false selection.

selected.description: When true, the checkbox is selected.

required.description: When true, the checkbox must be interacted with.

locked.description: When true, the selection cannot be changed.

RadioGroupTab.title: Radio Group Tab
RadioGroupTab.description: A group of radio buttons allowing single-choice selection.

groupName.description: The name of the radio button group.

documentId.description: The document containing the radio group.

recipientId.description: The recipient this group is assigned to.

required.description: When true, a selection is required.

ListTab.title: List Tab
ListTab.description: A dropdown list tab for selecting from predefined options.

listItems.description: The available options in the dropdown.

text.description: The display text for the option.

value.description: The value submitted when this option is selected.

selected.description: When true, this option is selected by default.

required.description: When true, a selection is required.

FormulaTab.title: Formula Tab
FormulaTab.description: A calculated field tab that computes its value from a formula expression.

formula.description: The formula expression used to calculate the tab value.

roundDecimalPlaces.description: The number of decimal places to round the result to.

TemplateRole.title: Template Role
TemplateRole.description: Maps a specific person to a role defined in a template when creating an envelope from a template.

roleName.description: The role name matching a role defined in the template.

clientUserId.description: Client user ID for embedded signing.

routingOrder.description: The routing order for the recipient.

CompositeTemplate.title: Composite Template
CompositeTemplate.description: A composite template combining server-side templates with inline template definitions for complex envelope workflows.

compositeTemplateId.description: A unique identifier for this composite template.

inlineTemplates.description: Inline template definitions merged with server templates.

EnvelopeTemplate.title: Envelope Template
EnvelopeTemplate.description: A reusable template that defines documents, recipients, tabs, and routing for common agreement workflows.

templateId.description: The unique identifier of the template.

uri.description: The URI for the template resource.

description.description: A description of the template and its purpose.

lastModified.description: When the template was last modified.

lastUsed.description: When the template was last used to create an envelope.

shared.description: Whether the template is shared with other users.

emailSubject.description: Default email subject for envelopes created from this template.

Notification.title: Notification Settings
Notification.description: Envelope notification settings controlling reminder schedules and expiration behavior.

useAccountDefaults.description: When true, uses the account's default notification settings.

reminderDelay.description: Days before the first reminder is sent.

expireEnabled.description: When true, the envelope will expire.

expireWarn.description: Days before expiration to send a warning.

CustomFields.title: Custom Fields
CustomFields.description: Envelope custom fields used for metadata, tracking, and integration with external systems.

listCustomFields.description: List-based custom fields with predefined options.

EventNotification.title: Event Notification
EventNotification.description: Configuration for per-envelope Connect webhook notifications. Allows specifying a listener URL and the events that trigger notifications.

url.description: The webhook endpoint URL to receive notifications.

loggingEnabled.description: When true, Connect logging is enabled for this envelope.

requireAcknowledgment.description: When true, requires an HTTP 200 acknowledgment from the listener.

includeDocuments.description: When true, includes document PDFs in the notification.
When true, includes documents in all notifications.

includeHMAC.description: When true, includes HMAC security headers for verification.

includeTimeZone.description: When true, includes time zone information.

includeCertificateOfCompletion.description: When true, includes the certificate of completion.

UserInfo.title: User Info
UserInfo.description: Information about a DocuSign user, typically the envelope sender or account owner.

RecipientEmailNotification.title: Recipient Email Notification
RecipientEmailNotification.description: Custom email notification settings overriding the envelope-level email for a specific recipient.

emailSubject.description: Custom email subject for this recipient.

emailBody.description: Custom email body for this recipient.

supportedLanguage.description: The language code for the notification email.

ErrorDetails.title: Error Details
ErrorDetails.description: Error information returned by the DocuSign API when a request fails.

message.description: A human-readable error message describing the issue.
